description: Izel uses the monolith energy to conjure a vision of Thomas, Benson’s deceased husband, emotionally torturing Benson to break his will. She threatens to resurrect and kill Thomas repeatedly, finally coercing Benson into revealing the site of the temple, deepening the sense of psychological horror.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: I was driving. Then seeing something in the road. Then... darkness.
An accident. I sat with you for days, hoping you would wake up.
I heard every word that you said.
Don't listen to it! It's not real!
When the doctor came in and said I was beyond helping, I heard that.
When my dad and sister begged you to hold on longer, I heard that, too.
I heard you say goodbye. I felt your hand on mine. You were so close, I could smell the liquor on your breath.
How much were you drinking that night?
You can create Thomas again and again. And each time, his death will be your fault. Care for a second try? A third?
Dying would be a relief now, wouldn't it? But it's not an option.
What do you want to know?
